# PassMax AI

> Nigeria's first gamified AI exam companion for JAMB, WAEC, NECO, BECE and Common Entrance.

PassMax AI helps Nigerian students pass their exams on the first attempt through gamified daily practice, AI-powered explanations, streak rewards, mock CBT exams and a parent monitoring dashboard.

## Product

- 60,000+ verified past questions from real JAMB, WAEC, NECO, BECE and Common Entrance papers
- Covers 3 education levels: Common Entrance (Primary 5/6), Junior Secondary (BECE/Junior WAEC), Senior Secondary (JAMB/WAEC/NECO/GCE)
- AI Study Chat tutor available 24/7 on any smartphone browser
- National leaderboard with weekly and all-time rankings
- Shareable result cards for WhatsApp distribution
- Family Bundle supports up to 3 children across different exam levels

## Pricing

- Free: 3 questions/day, no signup required
- Student Pro: ₦2,500/month — unlimited practice, mock exams, AI tutor, streaks
- Family Bundle: ₦5,000/month — up to 3 children, parent dashboard, WhatsApp alerts

## Links

- Landing page: https://passmax.ng
- App: https://app.passmax.ng
- Contact: hello@passmax.ng
